---
title: "EX01: Cyberbiz Integration Example"
subtitle: "Complete Integration Implementation"
author: "MAMBA Architecture Team"
date: "2025-08-27"
version: "1.0.0"
---

# Cyberbiz Integration Example

## Overview

This example demonstrates a complete integration with the Cyberbiz API, including authentication, data synchronization, and error handling.

## Setup

### Environment Configuration

Create a `.env` file with your Cyberbiz credentials:

```bash
# Cyberbiz API Configuration
CBZ_API_BASE_URL=https://api.cyberbiz.io
CBZ_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
CBZ_API_SECRET=your_api_secret_here
CBZ_STORE_ID=your_store_id_here

# Database Configuration
DB_HOST=localhost
DB_PORT=5432
DB_NAME=mamba_cbz
DB_USER=mamba_user
DB_PASSWORD=your_db_password
```

### Required Libraries

```r
# Install required packages
install.packages(c(
  "httr",
  "jsonlite",
  "digest",
  "DBI",
  "RPostgres",
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "purrr",
  "lubridate",
  "future",
  "furrr"
))
```

## Complete Integration Class

```r
library(R6)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(digest)
library(DBI)
library(dplyr)

CyberbizIntegration <- R6Class("CyberbizIntegration",
  public = list(
    initialize = function(env_file = ".env") {
      # Load environment variables
      if (file.exists(env_file)) {
        readRenviron(env_file)
      }
      
      # Initialize components
      private$setup_authentication()
      private$setup_database()
      private$setup_rate_limiter()
      private$setup_error_handler()
      
      message("Cyberbiz integration initialized successfully")
    },
    
    # Sync all data from Cyberbiz
    sync_all = function() {
      message("Starting full synchronization...")
      
      # Sync in order of dependencies
      self$sync_products()
      self$sync_customers()
      self$sync_orders()
      self$sync_inventory()
      
      message("Full synchronization completed")
    },
    
    # Sync products
    sync_products = function() {
      message("Syncing products...")
      
      products <- private$fetch_all_pages("/v1/products")
      
      if (length(products) > 0) {
        # Transform and save to database
        transformed <- private$transform_products(products)
        private$save_to_database(transformed, "cbz_products")
        
        message(sprintf("Synced %d products", length(products)))
      }
      
      return(invisible(products))
    },
    
    # Sync customers
    sync_customers = function() {
      message("Syncing customers...")
      
      customers <- private$fetch_all_pages("/v1/customers")
      
      if (length(customers) > 0) {
        transformed <- private$transform_customers(customers)
        private$save_to_database(transformed, "cbz_customers")
        
        message(sprintf("Synced %d customers", length(customers)))
      }
      
      return(invisible(customers))
    },
    
    # Sync orders
    sync_orders = function(since_date = NULL) {
      message("Syncing orders...")
      
      params <- list()
      if (!is.null(since_date)) {
        params$created_at_min <- format(since_date, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
      }
      
      orders <- private$fetch_all_pages("/v1/orders", params)
      
      if (length(orders) > 0) {
        # Save orders
        transformed_orders <- private$transform_orders(orders)
        private$save_to_database(transformed_orders, "cbz_orders")
        
        # Save order items
        order_items <- private$extract_order_items(orders)
        if (nrow(order_items) > 0) {
          private$save_to_database(order_items, "cbz_order_items")
        }
        
        message(sprintf("Synced %d orders", length(orders)))
      }
      
      return(invisible(orders))
    },
    
    # Sync inventory
    sync_inventory = function() {
      message("Syncing inventory...")
      
      inventory <- private$fetch_all_pages("/v1/inventory_levels")
      
      if (length(inventory) > 0) {
        transformed <- private$transform_inventory(inventory)
        private$save_to_database(transformed, "cbz_inventory")
        
        message(sprintf("Synced %d inventory records", length(inventory)))
      }
      
      return(invisible(inventory))
    },
    
    # Create order in Cyberbiz
    create_order = function(customer_id, items, shipping_address) {
      order_data <- list(
        order = list(
          customer_id = customer_id,
          line_items = items,
          shipping_address = shipping_address,
          payment_method = "credit_card",
          shipping_method = "standard"
        )
      )
      
      result <- private$make_request(
        endpoint = "/v1/orders",
        method = "POST",
        body = order_data
      )
      
      if (!is.null(result$order)) {
        # Save to local database
        transformed <- private$transform_orders(list(result$order))
        private$save_to_database(transformed, "cbz_orders")
        
        message(sprintf("Created order: %s", result$order$order_number))
      }
      
      return(result$order)
    },
    
    # Update inventory
    update_inventory = function(variant_id, quantity, location_id = NULL) {
      body <- list(
        inventory_level = list(
          available = quantity
        )
      )
      
      if (!is.null(location_id)) {
        body$inventory_level$location_id <- location_id
      }
      
      result <- private$make_request(
        endpoint = sprintf("/v1/inventory_levels/%s", variant_id),
        method = "PUT",
        body = body
      )
      
      return(result)
    },
    
    # Get sync status
    get_sync_status = function() {
      con <- private$get_connection()
      
      status <- dbGetQuery(con, "
        SELECT 
          'products' as entity,
          COUNT(*) as count,
          MAX(updated_at) as last_sync
        FROM cbz_products
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
          'customers' as entity,
          COUNT(*) as count,
          MAX(updated_at) as last_sync
        FROM cbz_customers
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 
          'orders' as entity,
          COUNT(*) as count,
          MAX(updated_at) as last_sync
        FROM cbz_orders
      ")
      
      return(status)
    },
    
    # Clean up resources
    close = function() {
      if (!is.null(private$db_connection)) {
        dbDisconnect(private$db_connection)
        private$db_connection <- NULL
      }
      message("Cyberbiz integration closed")
    }
  ),
  
  private = list(
    api_key = NULL,
    api_secret = NULL,
    base_url = NULL,
    db_connection = NULL,
    rate_limiter = NULL,
    error_handler = NULL,
    
    # Setup authentication
    setup_authentication = function() {
      private$api_key <- Sys.getenv("CBZ_API_KEY")
      private$api_secret <- Sys.getenv("CBZ_API_SECRET")
      private$base_url <- Sys.getenv("CBZ_API_BASE_URL")
      
      if (any(c(private$api_key, private$api_secret, private$base_url) == "")) {
        stop("Missing Cyberbiz API credentials in environment")
      }
    },
    
    # Setup database connection
    setup_database = function() {
      private$db_connection <- dbConnect(
        RPostgres::Postgres(),
        host = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST", "localhost"),
        port = as.integer(Sys.getenv("DB_PORT", "5432")),
        dbname = Sys.getenv("DB_NAME", "mamba_cbz"),
        user = Sys.getenv("DB_USER"),
        password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD")
      )
      
      # Create tables if they don't exist
      private$create_tables()
    },
    
    # Setup rate limiter
    setup_rate_limiter = function() {
      source("scripts/global_scripts/26_platform_apis/utils/rate_limiter.R")
      private$rate_limiter <- TokenBucket$new(
        capacity = 5,
        refill_rate = 2  # 2 requests per second
      )
    },
    
    # Setup error handler
    setup_error_handler = function() {
      source("scripts/global_scripts/26_platform_apis/utils/error_handler.R")
      private$error_handler <- APIErrorHandler$new("CBZ")
    },
    
    # Generate HMAC signature
    generate_signature = function(method, url, body = NULL) {
      timestamp <- as.character(as.integer(Sys.time()))
      
      string_to_sign <- paste0(
        toupper(method), "\n",
        url, "\n",
        timestamp, "\n",
        ifelse(is.null(body), "", toJSON(body, auto_unbox = TRUE))
      )
      
      signature <- hmac(
        key = private$api_secret,
        object = string_to_sign,
        algo = "sha256"
      )
      
      return(list(
        signature = signature,
        timestamp = timestamp
      ))
    },
    
    # Make authenticated API request
    make_request = function(endpoint, method = "GET", body = NULL, params = NULL) {
      # Rate limiting
      private$rate_limiter$acquire()
      
      full_url <- paste0(private$base_url, endpoint)
      
      # Add query parameters
      if (!is.null(params)) {
        query_string <- paste0(
          names(params), "=", 
          URLencode(as.character(params)),
          collapse = "&"
        )
        full_url <- paste0(full_url, "?", query_string)
      }
      
      # Generate signature
      auth <- private$generate_signature(method, full_url, body)
      
      # Make request with retry logic
      response <- retry_with_recovery(
        function() {
          VERB(
            verb = method,
            url = full_url,
            add_headers(
              "X-API-Key" = private$api_key,
              "X-Timestamp" = auth$timestamp,
              "X-Signature" = auth$signature,
              "Content-Type" = "application/json"
            ),
            body = body,
            encode = if (!is.null(body)) "json" else NULL
          )
        },
        error_handler = private$error_handler,
        max_retries = 3,
        request_info = list(endpoint = endpoint, method = method)
      )
      
      # Check response
      if (status_code(response) != 200) {
        error_content <- content(response, "text")
        stop(sprintf("API request failed: %s", error_content))
      }
      
      return(content(response, "parsed"))
    },
    
    # Fetch all pages of a resource
    fetch_all_pages = function(endpoint, params = NULL) {
      all_items <- list()
      page <- 1
      has_more <- TRUE
      
      while (has_more) {
        page_params <- c(params, list(page = page, per_page = 200))
        
        result <- private$make_request(endpoint, params = page_params)
        
        # Extract items (handle different response structures)
        items <- result[[gsub("^/v1/", "", endpoint)]]
        if (is.null(items)) {
          items <- result$data
        }
        
        all_items <- c(all_items, items)
        
        # Check if more pages
        if (!is.null(result$meta)) {
          has_more <- page < result$meta$total_pages
        } else {
          has_more <- length(items) == 200
        }
        
        page <- page + 1
        
        # Progress message
        if (page %% 10 == 0) {
          message(sprintf("  Fetched %d items...", length(all_items)))
        }
      }
      
      return(all_items)
    },
    
    # Transform products for database
    transform_products = function(products) {
      df <- map_df(products, function(p) {
        tibble(
          product_id = p$id,
          title = p$title %||% NA_character_,
          vendor = p$vendor %||% NA_character_,
          product_type = p$product_type %||% NA_character_,
          status = p$status %||% "active",
          tags = paste(p$tags, collapse = ","),
          created_at = parse_datetime(p$created_at),
          updated_at = parse_datetime(p$updated_at),
          synced_at = Sys.time()
        )
      })
      
      return(df)
    },
    
    # Transform customers for database
    transform_customers = function(customers) {
      df <- map_df(customers, function(c) {
        tibble(
          customer_id = c$id,
          email = c$email %||% NA_character_,
          first_name = c$first_name %||% NA_character_,
          last_name = c$last_name %||% NA_character_,
          phone = c$phone %||% NA_character_,
          tags = paste(c$tags, collapse = ","),
          accepts_marketing = c$accepts_marketing %||% FALSE,
          total_spent = c$total_spent %||% 0,
          orders_count = c$orders_count %||% 0,
          created_at = parse_datetime(c$created_at),
          updated_at = parse_datetime(c$updated_at),
          synced_at = Sys.time()
        )
      })
      
      return(df)
    },
    
    # Transform orders for database
    transform_orders = function(orders) {
      df <- map_df(orders, function(o) {
        tibble(
          order_id = o$id,
          order_number = o$order_number,
          customer_id = o$customer_id %||% NA_character_,
          email = o$email %||% NA_character_,
          status = o$status,
          currency = o$currency,
          subtotal_price = o$subtotal_price %||% 0,
          total_tax = o$total_tax %||% 0,
          total_shipping = o$total_shipping %||% 0,
          total_price = o$total_price %||% 0,
          payment_method = o$payment_method %||% NA_character_,
          fulfillment_status = o$fulfillment_status %||% NA_character_,
          financial_status = o$financial_status %||% NA_character_,
          created_at = parse_datetime(o$created_at),
          updated_at = parse_datetime(o$updated_at),
          synced_at = Sys.time()
        )
      })
      
      return(df)
    },
    
    # Extract order items
    extract_order_items = function(orders) {
      order_items <- map_df(orders, function(order) {
        if (!is.null(order$line_items)) {
          map_df(order$line_items, function(item) {
            tibble(
              order_id = order$id,
              line_item_id = item$id,
              product_id = item$product_id %||% NA_character_,
              variant_id = item$variant_id %||% NA_character_,
              title = item$title %||% NA_character_,
              sku = item$sku %||% NA_character_,
              quantity = item$quantity %||% 0,
              price = item$price %||% 0,
              total = item$total %||% 0,
              synced_at = Sys.time()
            )
          })
        }
      })
      
      return(order_items)
    },
    
    # Transform inventory for database
    transform_inventory = function(inventory) {
      df <- map_df(inventory, function(i) {
        tibble(
          variant_id = i$variant_id,
          location_id = i$location_id %||% NA_character_,
          available = i$available %||% 0,
          reserved = i$reserved %||% 0,
          incoming = i$incoming %||% 0,
          updated_at = parse_datetime(i$updated_at),
          synced_at = Sys.time()
        )
      })
      
      return(df)
    },
    
    # Save data to database
    save_to_database = function(data, table_name) {
      if (nrow(data) == 0) {
        return(invisible(NULL))
      }
      
      con <- private$get_connection()
      
      # Use upsert logic
      dbWriteTable(
        con, 
        table_name, 
        data,
        overwrite = FALSE,
        append = TRUE,
        row.names = FALSE
      )
    },
    
    # Get database connection
    get_connection = function() {
      if (is.null(private$db_connection) || !dbIsValid(private$db_connection)) {
        private$setup_database()
      }
      return(private$db_connection)
    },
    
    # Create database tables
    create_tables = function() {
      con <- private$get_connection()
      
      # Products table
      dbExecute(con, "
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cbz_products (
          product_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,
          title VARCHAR(255),
          vendor VARCHAR(255),
          product_type VARCHAR(100),
          status VARCHAR(20),
          tags TEXT,
          created_at TIMESTAMP,
          updated_at TIMESTAMP,
          synced_at TIMESTAMP
        )
      ")
      
      # Customers table
      dbExecute(con, "
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cbz_customers (
          customer_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,
          email VARCHAR(255),
          first_name VARCHAR(100),
          last_name VARCHAR(100),
          phone VARCHAR(50),
          tags TEXT,
          accepts_marketing BOOLEAN,
          total_spent DECIMAL(10,2),
          orders_count INTEGER,
          created_at TIMESTAMP,
          updated_at TIMESTAMP,
          synced_at TIMESTAMP
        )
      ")
      
      # Orders table
      dbExecute(con, "
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cbz_orders (
          order_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,
          order_number VARCHAR(50),
          customer_id VARCHAR(50),
          email VARCHAR(255),
          status VARCHAR(20),
          currency VARCHAR(3),
          subtotal_price DECIMAL(10,2),
          total_tax DECIMAL(10,2),
          total_shipping DECIMAL(10,2),
          total_price DECIMAL(10,2),
          payment_method VARCHAR(50),
          fulfillment_status VARCHAR(20),
          financial_status VARCHAR(20),
          created_at TIMESTAMP,
          updated_at TIMESTAMP,
          synced_at TIMESTAMP
        )
      ")
      
      # Order items table
      dbExecute(con, "
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cbz_order_items (
          order_id VARCHAR(50),
          line_item_id VARCHAR(50),
          product_id VARCHAR(50),
          variant_id VARCHAR(50),
          title VARCHAR(255),
          sku VARCHAR(100),
          quantity INTEGER,
          price DECIMAL(10,2),
          total DECIMAL(10,2),
          synced_at TIMESTAMP,
          PRIMARY KEY (order_id, line_item_id)
        )
      ")
      
      # Inventory table
      dbExecute(con, "
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cbz_inventory (
          variant_id VARCHAR(50),
          location_id VARCHAR(50),
          available INTEGER,
          reserved INTEGER,
          incoming INTEGER,
          updated_at TIMESTAMP,
          synced_at TIMESTAMP,
          PRIMARY KEY (variant_id, location_id)
        )
      ")
      
      # Create indexes
      dbExecute(con, "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_orders_customer ON cbz_orders(customer_id)")
      dbExecute(con, "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_orders_created ON cbz_orders(created_at)")
      dbExecute(con, "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_order_items_product ON cbz_order_items(product_id)")
    }
  )
)
```

## Usage Examples

### Basic Synchronization

```r
# Initialize integration
cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()

# Perform full sync
cbz$sync_all()

# Check sync status
status <- cbz$get_sync_status()
print(status)

# Close connection when done
cbz$close()
```

### Incremental Order Sync

```r
# Sync orders from last 7 days
cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()

last_week <- Sys.Date() - 7
cbz$sync_orders(since_date = last_week)

cbz$close()
```

### Create New Order

```r
cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()

# Create order
new_order <- cbz$create_order(
  customer_id = "cust_123456",
  items = list(
    list(
      variant_id = "var_789",
      quantity = 2,
      price = 1500
    )
  ),
  shipping_address = list(
    first_name = "John",
    last_name = "Doe",
    address1 = "123 Main St",
    city = "Taipei",
    province = "Taiwan",
    country = "TW",
    zip = "104",
    phone = "+886912345678"
  )
)

print(new_order$order_number)

cbz$close()
```

### Scheduled Sync Job

```r
# Run this as a scheduled job (e.g., via cron)
library(cronR)

sync_job <- function() {
  tryCatch({
    cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()
    
    # Sync recent data
    cbz$sync_orders(since_date = Sys.Date() - 1)
    cbz$sync_inventory()
    
    # Log success
    cat(sprintf("[%s] Sync completed successfully\n", Sys.time()))
    
    cbz$close()
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("[%s] Sync failed: %s\n", Sys.time(), e$message))
  })
}

# Schedule to run every hour
cmd <- cron_rscript("sync_cyberbiz.R")
cron_add(cmd, frequency = "0 * * * *", id = "cbz_sync")
```

## Monitoring and Alerting

```r
# Monitor integration health
monitor_cbz_integration <- function() {
  cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()
  
  # Check API connectivity
  test_response <- tryCatch({
    cbz$make_request("/v1/products?per_page=1")
    TRUE
  }, error = function(e) FALSE)
  
  # Check database connectivity
  db_status <- tryCatch({
    status <- cbz$get_sync_status()
    nrow(status) > 0
  }, error = function(e) FALSE)
  
  # Check data freshness
  status <- cbz$get_sync_status()
  stale_data <- any(
    Sys.time() - status$last_sync > 3600  # Data older than 1 hour
  )
  
  health <- list(
    api_connected = test_response,
    database_connected = db_status,
    data_fresh = !stale_data,
    last_check = Sys.time()
  )
  
  # Send alert if issues
  if (!all(health$api_connected, health$database_connected, health$data_fresh)) {
    # Send alert (email, Slack, etc.)
    message("⚠️ Integration health check failed")
    print(health)
  }
  
  cbz$close()
  
  return(health)
}

# Run health check
health_status <- monitor_cbz_integration()
```

## Performance Optimization

### Parallel Processing

```r
# Use parallel processing for large datasets
library(future)
library(furrr)

sync_large_dataset <- function() {
  cbz <- CyberbizIntegration$new()
  
  # Setup parallel processing
  plan(multisession, workers = 4)
  
  # Get all product IDs
  products <- cbz$sync_products()
  product_ids <- map_chr(products, ~ .$id)
  
  # Fetch detailed data in parallel
  detailed_products <- future_map(
    product_ids,
    ~ cbz$make_request(sprintf("/v1/products/%s", .x)),
    .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
  )
  
  # Process results
  # ...
  
  cbz$close()
}
```

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues and Solutions

1. **Authentication Errors**
   ```r
   # Check credentials
   Sys.getenv("CBZ_API_KEY")
   Sys.getenv("CBZ_API_SECRET")
   ```

2. **Rate Limiting**
   ```r
   # Adjust rate limiter settings
   private$rate_limiter <- TokenBucket$new(
     capacity = 3,      # Reduce burst
     refill_rate = 1    # Slower rate
   )
   ```

3. **Database Connection Issues**
   ```r
   # Test connection
   con <- dbConnect(
     RPostgres::Postgres(),
     host = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),
     # ... other params
   )
   dbListTables(con)
   ```

4. **Data Transformation Errors**
   ```r
   # Add more defensive coding
   transform_safe <- possibly(transform_function, otherwise = NULL)
   ```

## Related Documentation

- [Cyberbiz API Specification](../platforms/CBZ_cyberbiz_api.qmd)
- [API Architecture Overview](../API00_architecture_overview.qmd)
- [Authentication Patterns](../API01_authentication_patterns.qmd)
- [Rate Limiting](../API02_rate_limiting.qmd)
- [Error Handling](../API03_error_handling.qmd)
